    D

    dev.yanianz.star.reflection - package dev.yanianz.star.reflection
    The reflection module provides easy utilities for the usage of reflection.

    G

    getConstructor(Class, Class...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns the Constructor of a Class with the specified Parameters
    getEnumConstant(Class, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns a specific Enum Constant in an Enum
    getEnumConstants(Class) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns all Enum Constants in an Enum
    getField(Class, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns the Field of a Class
    getFieldValue(Object, Class, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns the Value of a Field in an Object
    getInnerNMSClass(String, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns an NMS Class inside a Class
    getInnerOBCClass(String, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns an OBC Class inside a Class
    getMethod(Class, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns a certain Method in the specified Class
    getMethod(Class, String, Class...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns the Method with certain Parameters
    getMethodOrAlternative(Class, String, String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns a certain Method in the specified Class
    getNetMinecraftClass(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns a `net.minecraft` class via Reflection.
    getNMSClass(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns an NMS Class via Reflection
    getOBCClass(String) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Returns an OBC Class via Reflection

    R

    ReflectionUtils - Class in dev.yanianz.star.reflection
    This class provides some useful static methods to perform reflection.

    S

    setFieldValue(T, Class, String, Object) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Modifies a Field in an Object
    setFieldValue(T, String, Object) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Modifies a Field in an Object

    T

    toPrimitiveTypeArray(Class[]) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.reflection.ReflectionUtils
    Converts the Classes to a Primitive Type Array in order to be used as paramaters
